title: taxonomy-brief output contract
description: Body of POST /agent/v1/taxonomy/brief. Every item becomes a promotions row kind='brief' — moderated; approval merges into the curated note layer (taxonomy_metadata.data.brief*).

briefEn.description: Markdown; >=2 blank-line-separated paragraphs; >=1 [[node-id]] vazba (validated against the live tree); external [text](url) links allowed

briefCs.description: Czech translation carrying the same paragraphs, vazby and links
